title: phlox drummondii subvar. aspera
intro: Phlox drummondii subvar. aspera, also known as Drummond's phlox or prairie phlox, is a perennial herb that belongs to the family Polemoniaceae. This plant is native to North America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory qualities. The health benefits of Phlox drummondii subvar. aspera include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and salves, and are often used to promote wound healing and relieve skin irritations.
